cues.text: Settle into your body. Let the breath find its own rhythm.
Begin to deepen the breath. Let each inhale expand the belly.
Allow the breath to become more circular. No pause between inhale and exhale.
Let go of control. Trust the breath. Let it move you.
If sensations arise, breathe into them. Don't resist.
You're halfway. Stay with it. The breath knows the way.
Let the breath soften now. Begin to slow down gently.
Return to your natural breath. No effort. Just rest.
Notice how you feel. Stay present with whatever is here.
Integration period. Let the body settle. Breathe naturally.
When you're ready, begin to bring awareness back. Gently open the eyes.
